name: Parmesan Croutons
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim crust from bread.
2. Cut the half-slice of bread into halves, making squares.
3. Diagonally cut each square into halves, making triangles.
4. Arrange the bread triangles in a shallow baking dish or pie plate.
5. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 30 seconds to 1 minute or until the bread is dry.
6. Remove the bread triangles from the microwave oven.
7. In a custard cup, microcook butter or margarine, uncovered, on 100% power for 30 to 40 seconds or until melted.
8. Drizzle over bread triangles.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
